brief: A boutique corporate law firm specialising in mergers, IP, and venture financing for founders and mid-market companies. The audience is CEOs, GCs, and founders evaluating counsel; trust and gravitas matter most. Pages should cover the firm, practice areas, attorney profiles, notable matters/insights, and contact. Lean into a conservative, authoritative aesthetic: a classic serif for headings, a navy-and-gold palette, formal spacing, and understated photography or portraits.
summary: Built Halloran Voss LLP — a six-page boutique corporate law firm site with a navy-and-gold palette, Cormorant Garamond/Inter type system, consistent header/footer, and distinct page content across home, firm, practices, attorneys, insights, and contact.
